message:
Update test suites for bd conformance and command syntax fixes

Conformance tests (conformance.rs):
- Mark history, changelog, and query as br-only features by removing
  bd assertions from these tests. These commands are beads_rust
  extensions not present in the bd reference implementation.
- Fix shell completions command: br uses "completions" (plural) while
  bd uses "completion" (singular). Update tests to use correct command
  for each tool.
- Apply minor formatting improvements (line wrapping).

E2E query tests (e2e_queries.rs):
- Update config command tests to use subcommand syntax:
  - "config --list" -> "config list"
  - "config --get KEY" -> "config get KEY"
  - "config --path" -> "config path"
  - "config --list --json" -> "config list --json"
- Adjust assertions to be more flexible about config output format.

Quick capture tests (e2e_quick_capture.rs):
- Rename q_with_custom_type_succeeds to q_with_custom_type_fails
- Update test to expect failure when using unknown issue types,
  consistent with the bd conformance type restrictions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
